name: codex-telegram
description: Telegram bridge for driving the local Codex CLI from a private chat.

interface.shortDescription: Run Codex through a private Telegram chat.
interface.longDescription: Repo-local plugin wrapping a Telegram bot that forwards tasks into the local Codex CLI, persists Codex thread IDs, and supports safe working-directory changes plus cancellation and timeout handling.
defaultPrompt: Set up the Telegram bridge for this repo.
Show how to start or stop the Telegram bot.
Explain the current Codex Telegram architecture.
